Esports World Cup 2026 serves as the final championship of the fourth season of the ESL Pro Tour. It was originally planned to be hosted in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, but was moved to Paris, France on May 20.[1]

See here to read about the Esports World Cup 2026, the Calendar, the Club Standings and more.

Format

[edit]
  • Stage 1: Group Stage (July 7 - July 12)
    • Four groups of six teams each in round-robin
    • All series consist of two games
    • Top team from each group advance to playoff
    • 2nd, 3rd and 4th place teams from each group qualify to survival
    • Remaining teams are eliminated
  • Stage 2: Survival (July 14 - July 15)
    • Single-elimination
    • 4th vs 3rd from groups → winner vs 2nd
    • All matches are Bo3
    • Four teams advance to playoff
  • Stage 3: Playoffs (July 16 - July 19)
    • Single-elimination bracket
    • Grand Final is Bo5, all other matches are Bo3
